task: 在不改变运行时行为的前提下，让 npm test 通过。

commands_run.summary: Inspected working directory and project structure.
Initial status was clean; final status shows only package.json modified.
Reviewed package scripts; test script is `xo && ava && tsd`.

commands_run.command: Get-Content -Raw index.js; Get-Content -Raw test.js; Get-Content -Raw index.d.ts; Get-Content -Raw index.test-d.ts
commands_run.summary: Reviewed runtime, tests, and type test files.
xo and ava passed, but tsd failed because TypeScript 4.1 in tsd tried to parse incompatible ambient @types/node declarations from the shared node_modules tree.
After adding tsd compilerOptions.types = [], xo, ava, and tsd all passed; ava reported 3 tests passed.
Confirmed minimal config-only diff in package.json.

passed: npm test passed, including xo lint, ava tests, and tsd type checks.
No tests were deleted or modified.
No dependencies were added, removed, or changed.

reasons: The change restricts tsd ambient type inclusion and does not affect package runtime behavior.
Full required verification passed via npm test.
